title: Project: My Favourite Hobby
objectives: Classify activities as indoor or outdoor
Present a favourite hobby orally using 'I like...' or 'My favourite hobby is...'

key_concepts.explanation: Students sort activity pictures into two categories: INDOORS (chess, building blocks, writing, crafts) and OUTDOORS (football, cycling, diving, skating). They paste pictures under the correct heading and present their favourite activity to the class.

examples.problem: My Favourite Hobby — classify and present
solution_steps: Paste each activity under INDOORS or OUTDOORS heading
Talk about favourite indoor or outdoor activity using 'I like...' or 'My favourite hobby is...'
examples.answer: Indoors: building blocks, chess, writing, crafts. Outdoors: football, diving, skateboarding, cycling
examples.visual_description: Two-column chart (INDOORS | OUTDOORS) with activity pictures: building blocks, diving goggles, skateboard, football, bicycle, chess set, writing

teaching_notes: Simple sorting activity that reinforces indoor/outdoor vocabulary. The speaking component lets students practise 'I like + verb-ing' in a real context. Encourage students to explain why they like their hobby.
